
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{},"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"findEmployees":[{},{},{},{},{},{},{},{},{},{}]},"path":[]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Jens"}},"path":["findEmployees",0]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Dustin"}},"path":["findEmployees",1]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Stefan"}},"path":["findEmployees",2]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Björn"}},"path":["findEmployees",3]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Sergiy"}},"path":["findEmployees",4]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Suvij"}},"path":["findEmployees",5]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Nithin"}},"path":["findEmployees",6]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Eelco"}},"path":["findEmployees",7]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Alexandra"}},"path":["findEmployees",8]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"David"}},"path":["findEmployees",9]}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
